I'm trying to enjoy this game but I find it very Glitchy  after completing the Quest unwonted guest!  the key to free the refugee hostages failed to appear: and early'er on an NPC, by the name mom'a refused dialog  before I even got the quest so finishing it doesn't matter cause the key failed to spawn another glitch was at the Circus Clowns Show the enemies respond when I returned to check if I missed something I will follow up on this later

It's not a terrible game, this game has been compared to cyberpunk but cyberpunk doesn't take place in space (unless you did the sun ending), and the developers aren't worried about minor details like how the one nightclub in the entire game is set up when the rest of Neon looks fine, on top of the fact they also had to account for the rest of the planets in all of the many systems. But enough rambling, all I'm saying is I spent 30 bucks on Outer Worlds for the same experience and all I got was pretty much Bioshock 1 in space, all respect to Bioshock 1, to me it seemed like Obsidian straight up copied their formula. In this game however I have the freedom to go to any planet, reset myself in a different universe all together, romance my companions, and fly any ship I want. It's a good SPACE game with a ton of freedom and that's why I recommend it.

I couldn't go through any of the story without brawling out. The narratives are so so SO gorgeous. If you haven't play it, PLAY IT. If you have played it, PLAY IT AGAIN. This is one of the games that you have to give it some time to sink in, but it's definitely worth it.
